title: Jann questions — FAFSA, OSU refund, JCEF — Oct 12 2021
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note from Oct 12, 2021 (Yahir age 19, ~6 weeks into OSU freshman fall) titled "-Jann questions," — three-question agenda for a Tuesday 1pm meeting with Jann: (1) When should I do FAFSA? (2) More refund from OSU bill? (3) JCEF 6k scholarship for internships abroad?
  • This is the cleanest live specimen of the mentor-as-financial-strategist dynamic. Jann is functioning here as Yahir's family-money-strategist-by-proxy — the role that no one in yahir family can fill. Same role-shape as diana hoff and al forthan in the Ford orbit stack.
  • The third question is the load-bearing one: JCEF 6k scholarship for internships abroad? — proves Yahir was already scoping international-internship funding in October 2021. The seed for the eventual China chapter is here, not at the trip itself.
  • Read against the Oct 15 follow up (where Yahir is already chasing JCEF refunds) — this October week is the moment JCEF goes from abstract scholarship name to active funding source he's strategising around. Also pairs with the Dec 2020 IDA Brenda note as Phase 2 of the same funding-stack assembly.
  • The note is agenda-form, not minutes-form — Yahir prepares for a phone call by writing the three questions down. There's no surfaced follow-up note recording Jann's answers, which is itself a graph signal: the answers landed in his head, not on the page.

Key fragments

"When should I do fafsa? / More refund from OSU bill? / Jcef 6k scholarship for internships abroad? / Tuesday, 1pm"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Earliest explicit dated mention of the JCEF-funded international-internship idea — backdates the china chapter origin point.
  • Densifies jann as a call-her-with-a-prepared-agenda mentor, not just a name on a thank-you list.
  • Confirms the recurring debt of gratitude / mechanic: Yahir doesn't have inherited financial literacy, so he sources it from a small adult network and prepares for those calls in writing.

Privacy

  • Jann (no surname surfaced — already entitied), JCEF, OSU. No PII.

Wikilinks

jann · jcef · osu · ford family foundation · debt of gratitude · china chapter · 2021 10 15 jcef refunds tv mentor handoff
